title: Full list of players injured for FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinals
original_text: Full list of players injured for FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinals left The FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinals will begin on July 9 with France taking on Morocco. REUTERS https://ss-i.thgim.com/public/incoming/3e5tnr/article71199484.ece/alternates/FREE_1200/Injured%20players%20REUTERS.jpg Take a look at the injury concerns for each team ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinals. Chennai The FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinals are set with six European teams joining title holder Argentina and African champion Morocco to battle for the top prize. France will take on Morocco in the opener on July 9 at the Boston Stadium. With the expanded format, teams have had to go through an extra stage - the Round of 32 - and the fatigue has caught up to several players, who are at risk of missing their respective last-8 fixtures. Take a look at which players are injured for the FIFA World Cup 2026 : Quarterfinal 1 France: Aurelien Tchouameni Morocco: Isamel Saibari Quarterfinal 2 Belgium: Amadou Onana Quarterfinal 3 England: Jordan Henderson Quarterfinal 4: Switzerland: Johan Manzambi, Luca Jaquez, Michel Aebischer Quarterfinal 1 France: Aurelien Tchouameni Morocco: Isamel Saibari Quarterfinal 2 Belgium: Amadou Onana Quarterfinal 3 England: Jordan Henderson Quarterfinal 4: Switzerland: Johan Manzambi, Luca Jaquez, Michel Aebischer
